profile.name: DEMIS RINCON
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.bio: Crafting digital experiences where ancient elegance meets modern performance. With over six years of expertise, I lead the development of immersive web and mobile applications, weaving narratives through code. From architecting AI legal assistants to volunteering as a JavaScript instructor at Bright Coders Academy, I aim to build interfaces that are as functional as they are timeless.
profile.quote: Innovation is the bridge between what was lost and what is yet to be discovered.

chronicle.description: Leading development for Regulix (B2B construction ops) and Litera (AI legal assistant). Architecting React Native mobile apps with Zustand, tailoring PostgreSQL/Prisma backends, and integrating Azure AI services.
Maintained global travel commerce applications. Led automated contract testing for 150+ APIs using Postman/Newman and architected E2E testing pipelines with Nightwatch and GitHub Actions.
Engineered diverse cross-platform solutions including truck rental management (COOP) and cruise administration systems (Celebrity Cruises). Specialized in complex UI animations and AWS integration.
Modernized internal logistics legacy software and developed the enterprise-wide design system. Built high-performance components and APIs serving confidential global data.
Architected sophisticated React components for enterprise registration modules, optimizing complex state management and registration flows.

relics.title: Litera AI
relics.description: An AI-powered legal assistant revolutionizing legal research and documentation through LLM integration and seamless mobile experiences.

relics.title: Celebrity Cruises
relics.description: Immersive mobile application for premier cruise travel, featuring real-time booking, interactive brochures, and luxury guest services.

relics.title: COOP By Ryder
relics.description: Award-winning commercial vehicle sharing platform. Architected the mobile and web interface for seamless fleet management operations.

relics.title: Regulix
relics.description: A comprehensive business operations platform tailored for U.S. construction companies, optimizing workflow and regulatory compliance.

relics.title: Hydra Marketplace
relics.description: High-performance TCG marketplace optimized for speed and cellular connectivity, serving a global community of collectors.
